title: MiniMax M3 开源权重上线Modular云平台
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
MiniMax (official)
@MiniMax_AI
M3 open weight just dropped and it's live on @ Modular cloud on day zero
with up to a 1M-context and MSA architecture kernel-to-cloud optimization is exactly what M3 needs
glad to have @ Modular with us from the start
Modular
@Modular
15h
M3 open weights from @ MiniMax_AI just dropped, and Modular is a Day Zero launch partner.
1M-token context. Text, image, and video input. Built for long-running agent and coding workloads.
Read our full announcement: modular.com/blog/day-zero-…
GIF
4:41 PM · Jun 12, 2026 13.4K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: MiniMax M3 开源权重上线Modular云平台
discovery_record.discovery_summary: MiniMax 发布 M3 模型开源权重，并宣布与 Modular 合作，在 Modular Cloud 上当天上线。M3 支持最高 1M-token 上下文长度，接受文本、图像、视频多模态输入，采用 MSA（Multi-Stream Attention）架构，专为长时间运行的智能体（Agent）与编码（Coding）工作负载优化。

key_excerpts.text: MiniMax 发布 M3 模型开源权重，并宣布与 Modular 合作，在 Modular Cloud 上当天上线。M3 支持最高 1M-token 上下文长度，接受文本、图像、视频多模态输入，采用 MSA（Multi-Stream Attention）架构，专为长时间运行的智能体（Agent）与编码（Coding）工作负载优化。

Post Log in Sign up Post MiniMax (official) @MiniMax_AI M3 open weight just dropped and it's live on @ Modular cloud on day zero with up to a 1M-context and MSA architecture kernel-to-cloud optimization is exactly what M3 needs glad to have @ Modular with us from the start Modular @Modular 15h M3 open weights from @ MiniMax_AI just dropped, and Modular is a Day Zero launch partner.
Built for long-running agent and coding workloads.

Built for long-running agent and coding workloads.
case_details: MiniMax 发布 M3 模型开源权重，并宣布与 Modular 合作，在 Modular Cloud 上当天上线。M3 支持最高 1M-token 上下文长度，接受文本、图像、视频多模态输入，采用 MSA（Multi-Stream Attention）架构，专为长时间运行的智能体（Agent）与编码（Coding）工作负载优化。
